character.name:
Vampire bat familiar, isometric pixel art, gothic horror. Small 
flying bat with wings spread wide, tiny body, pointed ears, red glowing 
eyes #ff2a44. Black body #0a0510, dark wing membrane. Cute but menacing. 
Crisp pixel art, transparent background.
